channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Summer Games Done Quick returns this July, schedule out now
item.description: Who's up for a Jak & Daxter / Half-Life hybrid?

item.title: Marathon's future includes duo queues, more PvE modes and better onboarding
item.description: Bungie details how it plans to grow its extraction shooter.

item.title: « J'ai découvert une nouvelle pluie de météores, qui provient d'un astéroïde en train d'être désintégré par le Soleil »
item.description: Des milliers de caméras astronomiques observent le ciel chaque nuit pour photographier les météores qui traversent notre atmosphère. Les chercheurs en sciences planétaires utilisent ces observations pour mieux comprendre la poussière, les astéroïdes et les débris de comètes présents dans notre...

item.title: A hotel check-in system left a million passports and driver’s licenses open for anyone to see
item.description: The tech company that maintains the hotel check-in system set its cloud storage to public, allowing anyone to access customers' data without a password.

item.title: The Analogue 3D is finally getting save states
item.description: Analogue has released a new firmware update for its Analogue 3D console that adds the Memories save state feature. Memories, which was first introduced with its handheld Analogue Pocket, allows you to save at any moment and resume from that exact spot later on, rather than having to reach a specific point in a game […]

item.title: A cheap OLED that’s actually good for gaming?
item.description: Alienware’s 27-inch 240Hz QD-OLED monitor brings OLED gaming to a lower price point. Here’s whether it’s worth it.

item.title: OpenAI keeps shuffling its executives in bid to win AI agent battle
item.description: OpenAI announced yet another reorganization Friday, consolidating certain areas and making company president Greg Brockman the official lead of all things product. In a memo viewed by The Verge, Brockman wrote that since OpenAI's product strategy for this year is to go all-in on AI agents, the company is combining its products to "invest in […]

item.title: 'This work is a glimpse of what is coming': Security team lays out how Anthropic Mythos helped build a working macOS exploit in five days
item.description: A product that took five years to build was broken into in five days, thanks to Mythos - and now Apple is working on a fix.

item.title: Silicon Valley’s vacationland needs a new energy provider just as AI is driving prices up
item.description: Lake Tahoe, Silicon Valley's favorite ski spot, is about to get hit with higher energy prices as AI drives demand for electricity.

item.title: Google Maps révolutionne sa navigation, le moteur hybride chinois de Renault et Gemini qui arrive dans les voitures – Récap’ Survoltés
item.description: L’actualité Survoltés a été chargée cette semaine : de la refonte majeure de Google Maps et d’Android Auto aux ambitions hybrides de Renault, en passant par les bons plans et essais marquants, voici un récapitulatif des contenus les plus consultés des derniers jours.

item.title: The ultimate Samsung tech challenge — from Galaxy phones to QD-OLED TVs, prove how well you know its gadgets with our quiz
item.description: Think you know Samsung's hardware and software? Take this 15-question quiz on its phones, appliances, earbuds and more.

item.title: It's time to ditch your takeout coffee habit — I'm a trained barista, and these are the top 3 coffee makers I recommend for cafe-quality lattes at home
item.description: Making cafe-quality drinks at home is a piece of cake when you have the right machine, and these are the best I've tested for perfectly foamed milk.

item.title: One of Intel’s fastest desktop CPUs is $50 off
item.description: The Intel Core Ultra 7 270K Plus was billed by the company in late March as one of its “fastest gaming desktop processor ever.” That hype was evidently accurate, as benchmarks done by Gamers Nexus show the processor giving AMD’s pricier X3D cache-equipped Ryzen 9000-series CPUs a run for their money. The Ultra 7 270K […]
